description_long: This apartment building features a modern, boxy design with three distinct floors, each incorporating large glass windows and clean white facades. The front showcases a mix of horizontal wooden paneling and lush planter boxes, adding warmth and greenery to the contemporary aesthetic. The uppermost floor includes a spacious rooftop terrace with outdoor seating and potted plants, accessible via an exterior staircase. Balconies with glass railings and integrated planters are present on the lower floors, providing private outdoor spaces for residents. The rear and side facades are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The building sits on a small patch of green landscaping, further enhancing its urban appeal.
description: A modern three-story apartment building with large glass windows, wooden accents, balconies, and a rooftop terrace, surrounded by planters and greenery.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main facade with wooden paneling, large windows, two balconies with planters, and the rooftop terrace above.
description_view_1: The rear view is mostly a plain white wall with minimal openings, emphasizing privacy and security.
description_view_2: The left side view reveals the rooftop terrace with outdoor furniture, a tall potted plant, and the exterior staircase leading up.
description_view_3: The right side view displays a mix of windows, a balcony, and the staircase, as well as additional landscaping at the base.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front, with large vertical and horizontal groupings, while the sides and rear have fewer, more spaced-out windows.
